title: Amolliar 4 Pack Apothecary Jars Bathroom Vanity Storage Organizer Set -Countertop Canister with Stainless Steel Lids &Cute Stickers - Qtip Dispenser Holder for Qtips,Cotton Swabs,Makeup Sponges(Black)
description:
About this item
✅ CUTE FARMHOUSE DECOR - The apothecary jar set will be a fun and beautiful addition to your home. Ideal home decor, rustic decor, western decor, bathroom decor, farmhouse decor, farmhouse style, western, rustic style, contemporary decor. Perfect size for a bathroom shelf or countertop, or some small space in your home.This not only helps you locate items easily but keeps them clean and sanitary, too.
✅ IDEAL STORAGE CONTAINERS - The apothecary storage jars are an attractive way to organize items.The space saving design provides plenty of room for storing a multitude of small essentials;Perfect organizer for Q-tip, cotton ball, cotton swab pad, cotton rounds, floss picks, tampon, bath salts, hair tie band, makeup brush, beauty egg, face brush, crayons, candy, pens,holds hair ties, clips, elastic bands, bobby pins, bows and more
✅SIMPLE AND FUNCTIONLA - 8OZ glass jar and Stainless steel lid. PS:THE LIDS CANNOT SCREW ON THE JAR,just stand on the jar.It makes it so much easier to lift off the top and reach in the items inside.Package includes:4 pack jars and lids.Cute Waterproof chalkboard label stickers are send for free
✅PERFECT GIFT -Use it or send it as a gift and give a big hit to anyone you’re thinking of! Perfect for wedding, housewarming/new home gift,birthday gifts, mother’s day gift,bridal or baby shower gifts; also great gift idea for mom, friend, sister, co-worker or just about anyone to use all year round
✅ SATISFACTION GUARANTEED - If quality and Transport damage problems can choose a replacement or refund .Do not hesitate to contact us,we will help you ASAP . Customer satisfaction is on our top priority.
reviews_5s:
Bought 2 sets for two houses. Good quality and useful! Sometimes the lids stick slightly in taking them off but that resolves after usage.Great size and the labeled stickers were a bonus I wasn’t expecting.We have redone our guest bathroom in brass. These jars go perfect with our bathroom decor. They are used to hold items that our guests may need.
These were offered at an incredible price. They look beautiful sitting on our guest sink area. The jars add a sense of elegance to the bathroom.I recently purchased the Apothecary Jars, and I must say, it has completely elevated the aesthetic appeal and functionality of my bathroom. The set's exquisite design and sturdy build reflect its high-quality craftsmanship and durability. The jars' substantial weight gives a sense of reassurance, indicating their long-lasting nature. Not only do they add a touch of elegance to my bathroom decor, but they also provide ample storage space for a variety of bathroom essentials, keeping my bathroom organized and clutter-free. The set's versatility allows for seamless integration into any bathroom theme, adding a sophisticated and organized touch to the space. I highly recommend this set to anyone looking for a blend of beauty and functionality in their bathroom storage solutions.These toiletry jars are the perfect addition to my new bathroom. Handy and convenient. With style!Super cute on our bathroom shelves and very practicalI appreciate these small storage containers for their high-quality appearance at an affordable price. They are remarkably lightweight and feature convenient labels that enable easy identification of contents. I am thankful for these containers as they contribute to a well-organized space.Just what I needed very aestheticGreat addition to any countertop.great value
reviews_1s:
I got these because the dimensions indicated that they were 4 1/2 inches tall, much larger than all of the other and significantly cheaper options on Amazon. It turns out that is not the height of the jar, it’s the height of the jar plus the lid, so it includes the little knob on top. All of the other apothecary jars on Amazon are $10 or less for this size jar, but these ones are 20. Absolutely not worth the money. Do not be fooled by the claimed dimensions!
They were packaged very well in foam, which is good because these are glass.
Another thing to consider is the lid suctions down on the jar, so do you have to hold down the jar to get the lid off. If you don’t, the jar will lift up a few inches with the lid and then fall down. Broken glass in the bathroom does not sound fun.Only received 2 pieces. Obviously it was returned by someone and resold, only they didn’t put it all in there and may have actually swapped product. Plastic not glass. Lids looked absolutely nothing like picture. Scratches all over.The first box I received had 2 broken bottles. The replacement box I received had 1 broken. The boxes were not damaged or previously opened either. Hope this vendor is not reselling broken packages.
Other than that they are cute bottles with perfect tops. But not worth the hassle that I have had to return them twice in 3 days time.These are very cheaply made and are not worth the price. The caps on mine are broken before I could even use them.Product was broken upon delivery, was not packaged properly for such delicate glass. It just has a very thin bag protecting it from smashing something solid. Obviously this is not an Amazon delivery issue but more of an appropriate selection on how to ship glass.I bought two sets thinking this was going to look amazing in my bathroom and it would be more organized. Sadly, I will have to return them. They are smaller than expected. The lids do not twist on. You just set it on. So, if someone knocked into it the lid would just pop right off. I do like that the jar is glass, though.Jars are a good size however they require 2 hands to open. One of the reasons I purchased was the manufacturer said it didn’t require 2 hands. Returned, do not recommend this product.Arrived with all pieces shattered.Order these and I received them they were all broken and when I got another set shipped there was one broken in it they barley use any packing material which causes them to break easily
